records.ety: [LL. homilia, Gr. <?/ communion, assembly, converse, sermon, fr. <?/ an assembly, fr. <?/ same; cf. <?/ together, and <?/ crowd, cf. <?/ to press: cf. F. homlie. See Same.]

defs: A discourse or sermon read or pronounced to an audience; a serious discourse.
A serious or tedious exhortation in private on some moral point, or on the conduct of life.
quotes: As I have heard my father Deal out in his long homilies.
